requiredPackageScripts.command: bun scripts/run-compact-checks.ts --label computational-private-proof-runners check:hdr-real-raw-private-proof check:panorama-real-raw-private-proof check:focus-real-raw-private-proof check:sr-real-raw-private-proof
requiredPackageScripts.name: check:computational-private-proof-runners

minimumArtifacts: RAW source path(s) and fixture id
launched app URL or Tauri bundle identifier
screenshot of the UI state before the edit
screenshot of the UI state after the edit
machine-readable run report with hashes and status

expectedEvidence: Public RAW fixture root is prepared.
Vite UI opens and captures a smoke screenshot.
validationLanes.purpose: Prove the local UI launch path is working before private RAW feature runs.
validationLanes.proofBoundary: Public smoke only; it does not prove private RAW output quality.

expectedEvidence: Accepted private run reports are detected when present.
validationLanes.purpose: Keep the open/edit/export runtime proof path wired to typed manifests and report acceptance.
validationLanes.proofBoundary: Public mode is contract-only until private RAW reports are present.

expectedEvidence: Private RAW review panels render using local proof artifacts.
validationLanes.purpose: Render private RAW computational review screens through the actual app UI.
validationLanes.proofBoundary: Requires local private artifacts; missing artifacts must stay visible instead of being treated as pass.

expectedEvidence: HDR, focus, panorama, and super-resolution private proof runners are invokable.
validationLanes.purpose: Provide the reusable local lane for heavy RAW feature proof generation.
validationLanes.proofBoundary: Runner invocation alone is not a substitute for per-feature UI review and output validation.
